title: Disconnect has no confirmation dialog which potentially may lead to bad consequences
author: igor2x
body_snippet:
I have been using mRemoteNG for years. Currently I am using mRemoteNG officially stable version 1.76.20 on Windows 10.
    1. Open some SSH connection to e.g. Linux computer. 
    2. Right button click on connection tab and select Disconnect. Problem appears. I have clicked this by mistake wanting to click Duplicate Tab (both start with letter D). Clicking Disconnect is potentially very dangerous action and I thing in this case confirmation dialog should appear with question: "Do you want to d...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `5e68a344` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:**  Disconnect has no confirmation dialog which potentially may

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Ou...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Missing disconnect confirmation dialog is a valid UX safety improvement to prevent accidental disconnections.
Approach: Add optional confirmation MessageBox before executing disconnect, controlled by a user setting in Options.
